valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Sat 18 Jul 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Sun 19 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High 500 miles west of Rockall 1033 slow-moving, intensifying 1034 by 0600 tomorrow. Low southern Sweden 1003 losing its identity

Northerly 6 to gale 8, backing northwesterly 4 to 6 later.

Mainly fair.

Moderate or good.
